## Which part of the framework does this affect?

- [ ] `spec/` — Specification (phase definitions, principles, concepts)
- [ ] `rubric/` — Assessment rubric (scoring, profiles, gap analysis)
- [ ] `mappings/` — Framework mappings (OWASP, MITRE, templates)
- [ ] `guides/` — Decision guides
- [ ] `examples/` — Worked examples or reference implementations
- [ ] `assets/` — Diagrams or visual assets
- [ ] Other (README, CONTRIBUTING, etc.)

## Is this a breaking change?

- [ ] Yes — existing assessments may need revision (MAJOR version bump)
- [ ] No — backward-compatible addition or clarification

## Checklist

- [ ] Language is practitioner-first (no unexplained jargon)
- [ ] Implementation-agnostic (no language-specific or tool-specific guidance in spec)
- [ ] Respects open/private boundary (no proprietary detection logic, payloads, or scoring)
- [ ] Related issue linked (if applicable): #
